description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GenAI Issue Labeller that triggers when an issue is opened, reopened, or edited. The workflow should have read access to repository contents and models, and write access to issues. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with concurrency control that cancels in-progress runs for the same issue. Check out the repository and use the action-genai-issue-labeller with a GitHub token, the current issue number, and debug logging.
